candidate_definitions.text: Packer templates for building minimal Vagrant baseboxes for multiple platforms

Bento is a project that encapsulates [Packer](https://www.packer.io/) templates for building [Vagrant](https://www.vagrantup.com/) base boxes. A subset of templates are built and published to the [bento org](https://app.vagrantup.com/bento) on Vagrant Cloud. These published boxe…
